title: mezochloa aubertii
intro: Mezochloa aubertii, also known as Aubert's mecho'ocha, is a type of plant that belongs to the family of flowering plants. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with the Mezochloa aubertii plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Mezochloa aubertii can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often consumed as a tea or used topically as a poultice.
